HUONG DAN NHAN VIEN - BIMLab Player

1. Cai dat
- Chay `BIMLab Player.exe`
- Chon Revit 2024, 2025, hoac 2026
- Bam `Cai add-in`
- Mo lai Revit

2. Dang nhap
- Vao tab `BIMLab`
- Bam `Login`
- Nhap email duoc cap quyen

3. Load plugin
- Bam `Load`
- Chon file `.dynx` do leader gui
- Sau khi load, app hien preview chi gom:
  - Panel
  - Plugin
  - Icon
- Nut plugin se duoc them vao ribbon neu con slot trong

4. Chay cong cu
- Bam nut plugin vua duoc nap
- Neu co input CAD, bam `Chon...`
- Chon CAD trong Revit, bam `Finish`
- Hoan tat input va bam `Chay`

5. Thu muc can biet
- `C:\ProgramData\BIMLab\DynLock\Scripts\` la noi luu file `.dynx`
- `%AppData%\Dynamo\Dynamo Revit\<version>\packages` la noi lay Dynamo packages

6. Neu loi
- Neu khong thay tab BIMLab, kiem tra da cai add-in dung version chua
- Neu khong load duoc file, kiem tra file `.dynx` co bi loi hoac sai key khong
- Neu cong cu bao thieu package, bao leader cai package do tren may
